scenarios.idealSpecificInput: Run a threat model on the user authentication flow in src/auth/. It's a user-facing web app deployed on AWS ECS. Concerned about session fixation and CSRF.
Audit the API endpoints in src/api/routes/ for injection vulnerabilities. Public-facing REST API behind nginx. Check for SQL injection and command injection.
Scan dependencies in package.json for known CVEs, then audit src/lib/crypto.ts for weak algorithm usage. Node.js Express app.
